action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 10 eval of CLIP+DANN+CORAL (epoch 27) achieved test balanced accuracy 0.555, below previous best 0.602. Validation BA peaked at 0.868, but domain gap still ~0.31. Training curve shows domain loss explosion after epoch 27, indicating instability. CORAL loss may be counterproductive. Analysis: Need to revert to simpler DANN without CORAL, strengthen focal loss (gamma=1.5), increase augmentation (RandAug mag=15), and train a quick 20-epoch run (~18 min) to test within remaining 35 min. Decision: Retrain CLIP+DANN (no CORAL) with improved hyperparameters, then submit eval. If score improves, may use TTA or ensemble of top checkpoints for final boost.
action.command: mkdir -p logs/iter_11 && export RAB_ITERATION=11 && python train.py --backbone clip_vitb16 --use_dann --coral_lambda 0.0 --focal_gamma 1.5 --label_smoothing 0.1 --dropout 0.4 --mixup_alpha 0.4 --randaug_magnitude 15 --domain_lambda 0.4 --epochs 20 --early_stop_patience 8 --seed 123
